skills.author: eduardou24
skills.name: ogt-docs
skills.description: Documentation-as-Source-of-Truth workflow. Use when working with projects that use docs/ as the canonical source for definitions, rules, and tasks. Routes to specialized sub-skills for specific documentation types.

skills.author: eduardou24
skills.name: ogt-docs-create
skills.description: Create new documentation entities in the docs-first system. Routes to specialized creation sub-skills for tasks, definitions, rules, features, and social content. Use when adding any new documentation.

skills.author: eduardou24
skills.name: ogt-docs-create-task
skills.description: Create and manage task documents in the docs/todo/ workflow. Use when creating new tasks, updating task status, or moving tasks between workflow stages. Provides complete task lifecycle management with verification.

skills.author: eduardou24
skills.name: ogt-docs-define
skills.description: General guide for creating definition documents. Use when you need to define WHAT something IS - concepts, entities, systems, or domains. Routes to specialized sub-skills for specific definition types (business, features, code, marketing, branding, tools).

skills.author: edwardbickerton
skills.name: dagny-nostr-nak
skills.description: Manage Nostr posting and engagement via the nak CLI. Use for creating notes, replying in threads, tagging npubs, checking replies/mentions, monitoring a relay (default wss://relay.primal.net), and publishing events with correct root/reply tags. Requires access to NOSTR_SECRET_KEY (nsec) for signing/

skills.author: edwardirby
skills.name: teams-anthropic-integration

skills.author: edwardirby

skills.author: edwardirby

skills.author: edwardirby
